steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage says it was “relatively rare” for railroad supporters to be secretive. This logically means the typical case was the opposite: being vocal.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
”More often” directly captures the statistical opposite of “rare”: if being secretive was uncommon, then more often supporters were vocal abolitionists like Bruce. “Fittingly” introduces an inappropriate moral judgment, “Granted” signals unwarranted concession, and “For example” treats this as a specific instance rather than a general norm.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
